headline: Northcoast Upgrades Intuit (INTU) from Neutral to Buy
summary: Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) is one of the 10 best large cap growth stocks to buy. Even though the share price has fluctuated recently, analyst sentiment about Intuit Inc. headline: Is Intuit (INTU) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Swings And DCF Upside Estimate
summary: If you are wondering whether Intuit's current share price offers fair value or a potential opportunity, it helps to step back and look at what the numbers are really saying about the business. Over the short term, the stock has been volatile, with an 8.6% decline over the last 7 days, a 10.1% gain over the last 30 days, and longer term returns of a 30.1% decline year to date and a 26.0% decline over the last year, compared with gains of 8.5% over 3 years and 19.1% over 5 years. Recent...
